root_text.sn22.30:1.2: “Yo, bhikkhave, rūpassa uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo rogānaṁ ṭhiti jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn22.30:1.6: yo viññāṇassa uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo rogānaṁ ṭhiti jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn22.30:1.7: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpassa nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho rogānaṁ vūpasamo jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo.
root_text.sn22.30:1.11: yo viññāṇassa nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho rogānaṁ vūpasamo jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn22.30:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising, continuation, and manifestation and regeneration of form is the arising of suffering, the continuation of diseases, and the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn22.30:1.3: The arising, continuation, and manifestation and regeneration of feeling …
translation_text.sn22.30:1.6: consciousness is the arising of suffering, the continuation of diseases, and the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn22.30:1.7: The cessation, settling, and disappearance of form is the cessation of suffering, the settling of diseases, and the disappearance of old age and death.
translation_text.sn22.30:1.8: The cessation, settling, and ending of feeling …
translation_text.sn22.30:1.11: consciousness is the cessation of suffering, the settling of diseases, and the disappearance of old age and death.”

reference_text.sn22.30:1.1: cck17.29, csp1ed13.27, csp2ed13.27, dr17.39, ms13S3_145, msdiv30, pts-vp-pli3.32, sya17.40
